The '''Deretta Destroyers''' was a mixed [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] named for heavy assaults on [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] depots. Among the members of the Destroyers was [[Tenk Lenso]], a talented [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]], who would later go on to serve with the elite [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Group]].

==History==
The Deretta Destroyers were based on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Deretta]]. They consisted of both [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing]] and [[BTL-S3 Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL-S3 Y-wing starfighters]]. The Destroyers were named for their ordnance-heavy [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] attacks on [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] depots. One notable squadron member was [[Tenk Lenso]], a [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]] who proved his skill in their service.

During one such depot attack run sometime prior to the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], the Destroyers were largely routed in an Imperial ambush. After [[Hyperspace/Legends|hypering]] into their target zone and softening up the opposition, they were prevented from escaping due to the presence of an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]]. With nothing to do but wait, the squadron was forced to endure several painfully slow minutes until the bulk of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] strike force arrived, during which all twelve Destroyers fell. The Rebel force did eventually win the day, though the loss of the Destroyers was a great blow.

Only one member of the squadron survived the encounter—Lenso—who managed to miraculously eject from the cockpit of his Y-wing moments before it was destroyed by a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]]. He was recovered by an Alliance [[Hospital ship/Legends|medical frigate]] and transferred to the secret [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]], where he was assigned to the elite [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Group]].
